subject: Portal chart missing image name
commit_message:
Portal chart missing image name

aafAgentImage is missing in values.yaml after recent change.
Because of that only repository is visible in helm template.

common/common/templates/_aafconfig.tpl:
image:
    {{ (default $dot.Values.repository $dot.Values.global.repository) }}/
    {{ $dot.Values.global.aafAgentImage }}

Issue-ID: OOM-2358
Signed-off-by: Ondřej Šmalec <o.smalec@partner.samsung.com>
Change-Id: I9be639dfb57cbd1263f02a485d359e747707d48e
